title: Ali Baba and the Forty Thieves
original_title: Ali Baba and the Forty Thieves
overview: Orphaned as a young child and adopted by a band of notorious thieves, now-grown Ali Baba sets out to avenge his father’s murder, reclaim the royal throne, and rescue his beloved Amara from the iron fist of his treacherous enemy.
